 {"id":"bd-fudb","title":"Sub-epic: Unit Tests for Core Functions (No Mocks)","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-04T21:52:37.094254993-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-05T11:12:37.793196581-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-05T11:12:37.793196581-05:00","close_reason":"All 6 sub-tasks completed: JSON utilities (bd-2rz1), git operations (bd-5phl), config management (bd-drb5), URL parsing (bd-i1jw), worktree management (bd-kzxw), repo list management (bd-sbs8).","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-fudb","depends_on_id":"bd-e1eo","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-04T21:52:37.251161228-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"bd-g7gw","title":"E2E: Comprehensive logging infrastructure","description":"## Objective
Implement and test detailed JSON logging across all E2E tests.

## Requirements

### Log Format Standard
```json
{
  "timestamp": "ISO8601",
  "test_name": "string",
  "phase": "setup|execute|verify|cleanup",
  "operation": "string",
  "duration_ms": number,
  "result": "pass|fail|skip",
  "context": { /* operation-specific data */ },
  "error": { "type": "string", "message": "string", "stack": "string" }
}
```

### Features to Implement
1. Structured JSON log writer for test framework
2. Log aggregation across test phases
3. Summary report generation
4. Log filtering by severity/phase
5. Machine-readable test results
6. Human-readable formatted output

### Integration Points
- test_framework.sh logging functions
- Per-test log files in $TEST_LOG_DIR
- Aggregate report in TAP + JSON formats

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All E2E tests emit structured JSON logs
- [ ] Log viewer/filter tool works
- [ ] Summary reports generated automatically
- [ ] Logs capture full context for debugging failures","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-04T21:57:28.077846221-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-05T12:38:37.977161476-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-g7gw","depends_on_id":"bd-6crg","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-04T21:57:38.630406765-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-gcff","title":"Implement documented but missing CLI flags (--private, --public, --from-cwd)","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"BrownCave","created_at":"2026-01-03T22:19:24.259436644-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-03T22:26:04.605141213-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-03T22:26:04.605141213-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented all documented but missing CLI flags: --private and --from-cwd for ru add, --public and --private for ru list.  {"id":"bd-gfd4","title":"Installer: remove set -e and echo -e","description":"install.sh currently uses global 'set -euo pipefail' and relies on 'echo -e' for colored logging; AGENTS.md requests no global set -e and best practice prefers printf. Make install.sh explicit-error-handling (set -uo pipefail), switch logging to printf, and avoid Bash-4-only lowercase expansions in prompts for broader portability.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-04T19:43:24.045649031-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-04T19:45:32.845850452-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-04T19:45:32.845850452-05:00","close_reason":"Remove global set -e, switch logging to printf, add explicit error handling, avoid bash-4-only lowercase expansion"}
 {"id":"bd-gokv","title":"E2E: Error handling and recovery tests","description":"## Objective
End-to-end tests for error conditions and recovery mechanisms.

## Test Scenarios
1. Network timeout handling
2. Disk space exhaustion
3. Permission denied scenarios
4. Corrupted state file recovery
5. Interrupted operation resume
6. Concurrent access conflicts

## Requirements
- Simulate realistic failure conditions
- JSON logging: error_type, context, recovery_action, success
- Verify graceful degradation
- Test cleanup after failures

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 6 scenarios pass
- [ ] Errors produce actionable messages
- [ ] Recovery mechanisms restore valid state
- [ ] No data loss on recoverable failures","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-04T21:57:13.668603363-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-04T21:57:13.668603363-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-gokv","depends_on_id":"bd-6crg","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-04T21:57:26.497279804-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-gokv","depends_on_id":"bd-g7gw","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-04T21:57:41.06728777-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
